title: Hardcover
description: Adds a few vanilla-adjacent QOL tweaks to the Recipe Book.
body:
This mod is based on [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb) by [marshmallow](https://modrinth.com/user/marshmallow). | Features | |:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------:| | **Alternative Recipe Book Layout**
Adds one extra row of recipe results by rearranging the search field and navigation buttons. | | **Alternative Recipe Button**
Displays the resulting item instead of the recipe, and a tooltip shows the material list. | | **Auto Close Recipe Book**
Automatically close the recipe book when a supported screen is closed. | | **Bounce Effect**
Toggles the subtle bounce effect seen when new recipes are added. | | **Centered Inventory**
Centers the inventory and prevents it from moving when the recipe book is opened. | | **Mouse Wheel Scrolling**
Enables mouse wheel scrolling within the recipe book. | | **Circular Scrolling**
Enables circular scrolling when using the next and previous buttons. | | **Invert Scroll Direction**
Inverts the scroll direction when using the mouse wheel. | | **Creative Tabs**
Categorize recipes based on item groups, similar to the Creative inventory. | | **Compact Creative Tabs**
Show more categories in the recipe book by reducing tab size. | | **Dark Mode**
Vanilla Tweaks and Default Dark Mode based in-built dark mode resource packs. | | **Quick Craft**
Quickly craft items by clicking on recipes while pressing the 'Quick Craft' keybinding. | | **Recipe Book**
Toggles the recipe book button in supported screens. | | **Ungroup Recipes**
Ungroup any grouped recipes into single recipes. | | **Unlock All Recipes**
Unlock all recipes when a player enters a single player world. |
